steps.prompt: Monthly vendor tooling scan. Check: (1) github.com/anthropics — new repos since last scan, updated repos, new releases. (2) platform.claude.com/docs/en/release-notes — API changes. (3) Claude Code changelog — new features, hook events, SDK updates. (4) modelcontextprotocol GitHub — MCP protocol changes. Compare against meta/research/anthropic-tooling-landscape.md. Write delta to .claude/plans/vendor-landscape-delta.md: what's new, what changed, what's relevant to our infra.

Read .claude/plans/vendor-landscape-delta.md. For each new tool/feature: (1) does it replace something we built? (2) does it enable something we couldn't do? (3) does it affect orchestrator, hooks, skills, or MCP? Write actionable items to .claude/plans/vendor-landscape-actions.md. Update meta/research/anthropic-tooling-landscape.md with new findings. Commit with [vendor-scan] prefix.
